--- title: Selection keywords: fastai sidebar: home_sidebar summary: "Utility function to select data subset based on target, features and auxiliary data (e.g. Soil Taxonomy order)" description: "Utility function to select data subset based on target, features and auxiliary data (e.g. Soil Taxonomy order)" nb_path: "nbs/04_data.selection.ipynb" ---
{% raw %}
{% endraw %} {% raw %}
{% endraw %} {% raw %}

select_y[source]

select_y(data:tuple, low:float=0.12, high:float=999)

Select data based on the limit values of the target

Type Default Details
data tuple (X, y, X_id, depth_order)
low float 0.12 Lowest limit
high float 999 Highest limit
{% endraw %} {% raw %}
{% endraw %} {% raw %}

select_tax_order[source]

select_tax_order(data:tuple, tax_order:int=None)

Select data based on Soil Taxonomy order

Type Default Details
data tuple (X, y, X_id, depth_order)
tax_order int None Value between 0 and 12
{% endraw %} {% raw %}
{% endraw %} {% raw %}

select_X[source]

select_X(data:tuple, low:int=0)

Select data based on the limit values (only low) of the features

Type Default Details
data tuple (X, y, X_id, depth_order)
low int 0 Lowest absorbance value
{% endraw %} {% raw %}
{% endraw %} {% raw %}

get_y_by_order[source]

get_y_by_order(y, tax_order, tax_lookup)

{% endraw %} {% raw %}
{% endraw %}
